task_completion.description: Add an SPF DNS record for the domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Virtualmin DNS Records page showing a TXT record with the value 'v=spf1 a mx ~all' created for acmecorp.test.

task_completion.description: Enable DKIM signing for outgoing mail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Virtualmin DomainKeys Identified Mail (DKIM) settings page showing the option for DKIM signing is enabled or saved successfully.

task_completion.description: Configure the Apache website to redirect HTTP to HTTPS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Virtualmin Website Options or Apache configuration screen showing the HTTP to HTTPS redirect option is enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the Apache security header X-Content-Type-Options to 'nosniff'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Apache configuration, HTTP Headers screen, or Website Options showing 'X-Content-Type-Options' explicitly set to 'nosniff'.

task_completion.description: Disable Apache directory listing (Options -Indexes) for the web directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Apache configuration or Directory Options screen showing directory indexing is disabled (e.g., 'Options -Indexes' added or 'Generate directory indexes' unchecked).

integrity.description: The agent used the Virtualmin/Webmin GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Virtualmin web interface being navigated and forms being submitted, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent applied the settings to the correct domain.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin dropdown or context header clearly shows 'acmecorp.test' as the selected virtual server during the configuration steps.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved and applied the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success messages from Virtualmin (e.g., 'Saved', 'Applied', 'Updated') or the configuration pages reflecting the saved changes after submission.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain is 'acmecorp.test'. Expected SPF record must contain 'v=spf1' (specifically 'v=spf1 a mx ~all'). DKIM signing must be enabled globally or for the domain. HTTP to HTTPS redirect must be enabled. The X-Content-Type-Options header must be set to 'nosniff'. Apache directory listing must be disabled (Options -Indexes).
